g.text: THE FLOW · OPEN TO FIRST OBJECT
One guided path from a blank screen to a finished object.

text.tspan: Nine steps, one branch. Whether a beginner is led or left to explore, the system keeps them oriented, recoverable, and moving toward a win.
A new file, not an empty void.
A clear offer to begin, right away.
Move and shape with live feedback.
One tap returns you to safe.
A finished mug — proof it works.
Leave with the object and a cheat

g.text: Every step answers the same question a beginner is silently asking: where am I, what do I do, and how do I undo it?
